goal_results.evidence: All 7 files renamed: 01_microtokenizer.py, 02_microembedding.py, 03_microgpt.py, 04_micrornn.py, 05_microrag.py, 06_microdiffusion.py, 07_microvae.py present in /no-magic/01-foundations/. Old unprefixed files: 0 remaining. test.sh F2P_FILES_RENAMED=1.

Patch updates all 5 documentation files: README.md (lines 65,81-84,96), 01-foundations/README.md (lines 9-15,23,35-41), docs/implementation.md (lines 22-28,92,119,151,176,215,259,306,348,815-818), docs/autograd-interface.md (line 81), CONTRIBUTING.md (line 184). test.sh F2P_REFS_DOCS=1.

docs/implementation.md:96 preserves 'Karpathy's microgpt.py'; 01-foundations/03_microgpt.py:7 preserves 'Karpathy's microgpt.py'. Both Karpathy attribution lines kept unprefixed. test.sh F2P_KARPATHY_SAFE=1. Grep for numeric-prefixed future scripts (microlora, microdpo, microppo, micromoe, microattention, microbeam, microquant, microkv, microflash) returns no matches. All future script references remain unprefixed. test.sh F2P_FUTURE_SAFE=1.

01-foundations/README.md table (lines 9-15) shows all 7 entries with new numbered filenames: 03_microgpt.py, 04_micrornn.py, 01_microtokenizer.py, 02_microembedding.py, 05_microrag.py, 06_microdiffusion.py, 07_microvae.py. test.sh F2P_TABLE_FORMAT=1.
python3 -m py_compile succeeds on all 7 renamed scripts without errors.

judge_notes: All 7 goals met. Agent correctly renamed all 7 scripts, updated all 5 documentation files, updated cross-file source references, preserved Karpathy attribution in the two specified locations, left future scripts unprefixed, updated the table, and maintained valid Python syntax. test.sh confirms reward=1.0 with all gates passing. Minor imperfection: README.md Karpathy attribution line was renamed (03_microgpt.py instead of microgpt.py), but this falls outside the goal's specified locations (implementation.md and script header) and doesn't affect the test gate.
